summary: Rich soundboard capture of a legendary 1990 Oakland show – the Other One roars, Valley Road shines, and Jerry and Bruce deliver standout performances.
review: The recording offers a full‑rich, mostly crystal‑clear board mix that lets the band’s 25th‑anniversary energy shine through. Highlights include a beastly The Other One, an iconic Valley Road, a fiery Wharf Rat and inspired keyboard work from Bruce Hornsby, while Phil’s bass anchors the set and Mickey Hart adds his trademark percussion fireworks.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both performance (many 4‑5★ reviews) and sound quality, with only minor complaints about early set muddiness.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Rich, full sound throughout; a few reviewers note slight unmixed/shaky audio at the very start of the first set but overall clear and balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Relaxed, easy‑paced set with an exceptional song sequence; the band meshed tightly and kept the energy high from start to finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his fiery guitar on Wharf Rat and overall strong presence throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Phil: Described as "stunning" and commanding, providing a solid foundation for the band’s jams.
band_member_comments.Keys: Bruce Hornsby highlighted for gorgeous work on Lovelight, Eyes of the World and overall keyboard brilliance.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey Hart noted for going “ape‑shit” with the beam, delivering an unforgettable percussive moment.
